context: The 2025 German chart year was defined by the viral dominance of Oimara's 'Wackelkontakt', a schlager-inflected pop track that accumulated over 180 million streams and spent seven weeks at number one, proving the enduring appeal of German-language pop. International stars ROSÉ, Bruno Mars, and Linkin Park also featured prominently, reflecting a diverse streaming landscape where German domestic acts and global pop coexisted.
